Video.summary: US Marshals are tasked with finding a young boy that has been kidnapped for ransom. A man suspected of dealing contraband is reported by his ex-girlfriends mother. Officers raid a home looking for a dangerous fugitive.
Video.title: In-Law Problems

Video.summary: A man stages a sit-in in his car in an attempt to stop it from being towed. A homeowner denies that he’s selling drugs despite the large amount of evidence found in his home. A safe full of evidence is found during a traffic stop.
Video.title: Safe Cracking

Video.summary: A family with kids is taken on a high speed car chase. A intoxicated suspect tries to jump a fence while protesting that he’s not trying to run away. A jealous boyfriend terrorizes his girlfriend and her parents.
Video.title: High Jump Fail

Video.summary: A suspect selling narcotics takes off on foot. A bank robber leaves his wallet in an abandoned money bag. Multiple domestic violence calls end in arrests
Video.title: Dyed in the Wool

Video.summary: Deputies discover a purse and a sock containing paraphernalia during an arrest. Deputies pursue an intoxicated motorcyclist. A woman is suspected of stealing a cake.
Video.title: Rocks in my Socks

Video.summary: A carjacking results in a chase and a flipped vehicle. Suspects crash a truck after attempting to steal beer. A man attempts to swallow his drugs during a bust.
Video.title: Beer Run

Video.summary: Deputies confront an intoxicated man who threatened a restaurant owner. A man tells officers he can assault who he wants. Officers are called to an altercation over a sleeping bag and a backpack.
Video.title: Check Please!

Video.summary: Officers pursue an SUV on the freeway. Deputies are called after an agitated man arms himself with scissors. A driver tells officers the illegal items found in his car was left by a friend.
Video.title: Decorating Tips

Video.summary: Officers get a tip and locate the suspect in a recent shooting. A woman is questioned when she is found parked alone in her car behind closed businesses. Officers respond to a call involving juveniles spray painting an electrical box.
Video.title: You're Not Banksy

Video.summary: Police officers set up a sting operation using a taxi cab in to bust prostitution. A man claims he can’t remember his ‘girlfriend’s’ name when officers suspect the woman is actually a stranger. Female undercover officers set up a sting operation to bust johns.
Video.title: Amnesia Can Happen

Video.summary: Officers pursue a motorcyclist driving erratically. Deputies find broken drug paraphernalia in a car when conducting a traffic stop. A man who beat up his girlfriend hides from officers in an attic.
Video.title: Nothing Upstairs

Video.summary: A drug dealer swallows something suspicious as deputies move in to arrest him. Deputies pull over a father with his son in the car. A woman files a kidnapping report against her own boyfriend.
Video.title: Hiding the Evidence

Video.summary: Officers respond to a call of a woman holding a loaded gun to her head. Officers kick in a door to halt an assault in progress. A woman driving a stolen vehicle claims it was purchased by a friend.
Video.title: My BFF Screwed Up

Video.summary: A man wanted for unpaid child support hides from deputies. Officers respond to a sexual predator following a minor. A man with a checkered driving record crashes his car.
Video.title: He's the Gingerbread Man

Video.summary: A police chase becomes more dangerous when the hood of a stolen vehicle flips open. A purse snatcher denies robbing a woman. A limping man with a knee injury denies crashing his car into a tree.
Video.title: Hood Flip

Video.summary: Deputies tase a man who almost ran over a deputy with his truck. A man gives police false information after saving a boy who fell into a pool. A woman tries to buy drugs from an undercover officer.
Video.title: Poolwatch

Video.summary: Police respond to an emergency call and find a man in dire trouble. Deputies respond to an abusive husband at a local eatery. Two women try to buy narcotics from an undercover deputy during a sting.
Video.title: Table for Two

Video.summary: Officers engage in a foot pursuit after the passenger of a suspicious vehicle starts running. A man barricades himself in the house after stabbing his nephew. A teenager is caught ditching school to smoke marijuana.
Video.title: Playing Hooky

Video.summary: A man throws out his narcotics during a foot-chase with police. A woman is arrested for possession of drug paraphernalia. Officers call for back-up after a woman is held at knife-point.
Video.title: Hard Ticket

Video.summary: Officers respond to a traffic dispute involving an assault with a tire iron. Police are led to a battered woman after she dials 911. Officers on patrol encounter a couple engaged in prostitution.
Video.title: Tire Iron Road Rage

Video.summary: Officers engage in a high-speed pursuit of a stolen vehicle. Police spot a motel fire, alert the guests and contact the Fire Department. Officers pursue a suspect on a stolen motorcycle.
Video.title: Where There’s Smoke

Video.summary: A man runs from Police over a parole violation. Officers respond when a trouble maker is expelled from a bar for bad behavior. Police pursue a man after he bails from his car during a traffic stop.
Video.title: Bad Behavior

Video.summary: Officers search for suspects stealing rims at a car dealership. A married couple claim drugs found in their car were from a nearby ditch. Officers detain an inebriated man arguing with a store clerk.
Video.title: That’s Not Ours

Video.summary: An officer poses as a prostitute in an attempt to attract “johns”. A suspect flees on foot through the woods following an assault. An officer investigates a local bar known for illegal activity.
Video.title: Trouble Brewing

Video.summary: When a driver fails to stop, a freeway pursuit ensues. Officers investigate a suspicious car parked in a commercial parking lot. Officers respond to a shoplifting call.
Video.title: Spoonful of Trouble

Video.summary: Following a brief slow-speed pursuit, the desperate driver flees on foot. An officer responds to an assault. A dog owner is informed of her dog's mayhem and given a citation.
Video.title: Barked Up The Wrong Tree

Video.summary: Deputies assist border patrol in pursuit of a vehicle that has blown checkpoint and its tires. A drunk woman is pulled over not knowing she is missing a tire.
Video.title: Connect Four

Video.summary: Officers recover a small bag of drugs from a crying suspect. A drunk woman hides a second ID in her back pocket. Police stop a vehicle that hit a patrol car.
Video.title: Multiple Identities

Video.summary: A woman needs police help when her boyfriend threatens her with a knife. A zebra runs loose on the streets of Sacramento County. A man wants to use a stick and a rock to settle a dispute.
Video.title: If You Hear Hooves

Video.summary: An officer wrestles a squirrely meth user who thinks he’s the Incredible Hulk. Cops catch a drug-carrying sprinter when he runs out of gas. A belligerent suspect doesn’t take kindly to having his socks removed.
Video.title: The Fighting Kind

Video.summary: A normal traffic stop turns into an off-road race through a residential neighborhood. Police find a runaway suspect taking refuge in a family member’s closet. A domestic dispute erupts over chips and dip.
Video.title: Cruising the Neighborhood

Video.summary: Officers learn the hard way that even a taser can’t take some suspects down. Patrol cars roll up on a couple in a darkened pickup truck. Cops arrest one of the most polite suspects in America.
Video.title: Taser Proof

Video.summary: A group of suspects race a stolen SUV through a residential neighborhood. A drunk man has a kitchen knife and a listening problem. Two usual suspects are going back to jail for their latest escapades.
Video.title: Familiar Faces

Video.summary: A kind man gets more than he bargained for from his new roommate. Cops discover the unexpected consequences of punching a scooter. Officers stop a sober suspect who may not be from the same planet as them.
Video.title: Strange Encounters

Video.summary: A jaywalker darts on a mad dash through the weeds. Things go badly for a suspect on a stolen motorcycle when choppers help officers track him down. A domestic dispute leads cops to a slew of unexpected crimes.
Video.title: Eye in the Sky

Video.summary: A man’s wife can’t help him stay out of jail no matter how much he calls for her. One thief tries to give back his stolen loot. When approached by officers, a woman goes from passed out to out of control.
Video.title: Tell it to My Wife

Video.summary: Unhappy about getting stopped for drinking while biking, a man takes off on foot. A woman in her PJs doesn’t know how she wound up in a stolen vehicle. Officers discover a couple smoking Meth in front of a young child.
Video.title: Getting Funky

Video.summary: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.
Video.title: A Weekly Thing

Video.summary: A vehicular pursuit in Florida comes to a head when the driver careens into a ditch. An officer responds to a troubling domestic call. An intoxicated brawler is taken into custody.
Video.title: Domestic Headbanger

Video.summary: A man assaults another man for groping his girlfriend. Police make several drug-related arrests while patrolling New Orleans. An adventurous suspect is arrested while scaling down a drainpipe.
Video.title: Bourbon and Blood

Video.summary: Officers respond to a domestic dispute call resulting in an indecent arrest. Officers in Tennessee investigate a house known for drug activity. Officers in Southern California check in with a driver parked in a known drug hotbed.
Video.title: Fany Pack Peddler

Video.summary: A high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. A Florida man driving a stolen vehicle claims it belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.
Video.title: My Mom's Car

Video.summary: Officers in Boston bust a drug dealer in the midst of a transaction. Two adult men are questioned and later arrested for throwing bottles out of a moving vehicle. Officers set up a suspect who’s a known online predator in a sting operation.
Video.title: All Bottled up

Video.summary: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer-involved fight. A brazen driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving.
Video.title: Drive Thru Blues

Video.summary: An attempted pull over results in a foot chase and eventual arrest. An officer makes a drug-related arrest during a routine traffic stop. An officer makes a sizeable drug seizure during a field sobriety check.
Video.title: Never Been Busted

Video.summary: Officers make an arrest in connection to a string of robberies and recover discarded drugs and a gun in the process. An officer responds to a domestic dispute involving an intoxicated and hostile female. An officer checks in with a suspicious group of men in a high crime area.
Video.title: Fire in the Hole

Video.summary: Officers in Las Vegas make an arrest in a grand theft auto call with the help of the K9 unit. An uncooperative driver takes off in the middle of a traffic stop. A woman in Florida is rewarded for her honesty and is let go as her friends are arrested.
Video.title: Dumpster Dummy

Video.summary: An Officer spots a gun in a vehicle during a routine traffic stop, but the passengers are denying ownership. An intoxicated woman assaults her step-father with a butter knife after he refuses to take her to the hospital for spider bites. A man denies vandalizing a building even though there's evidence on his fingers.
Video.title: Butter Cutter

Video.summary: Two troublemakers get caught up in a prostitution sting. A cop quickly finds his hands full when he questions a cagey lady. An argument draws the attention of a vigilant patrol officer.
Video.title: Sidewalk Licker

Video.summary: An armed trespasser uses a young dog as a shield. A woman under the influence goes on a rampage, tearing into homes and people. A cat lady calls the cops when her neighbors get nosy.
Video.title: Cats and Dogs

Video.summary: A car thief is foiled by dreams of fame. In order to catch an oblivious driver's attention, officers are forced to disable his car. A woman tries to evade arrest by giving deputies a fake name.
Video.title: Four Felonies and a Flat Tire

Image.alt: Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
Four Felonies and a Flat Tire

Video.summary: A homeless man puts up a serious fight to maintain his freedom. A suspicious man and woman in a parked car catch an officer’s attention. A lovers’ squabble draws attention to an outstanding warrant.
Video.title: What’s in the Box?

Video.summary: A teenager makes an adult decision and calls the cops on her neighbor. When a mother chooses violence, grandma phones the police. Deputies question a suspicious group of people behind a truck stop.
Video.title: Thanks for Nothing, Mom

Video.summary: Deputies respond to a brutal car wreck. The cops question a robbery suspect who claims to be the real victim. Officers find a man who says that he suffers from a disorder that causes him to run away.
Video.title: Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back

Image.alt: Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back

Video.summary: An evasive driver tells the police that he’s the victim of a very bad girl. A pregnant lady makes some questionable choices. A robbery suspect finds some comfort in coming clean.
Video.title: The Naked Truth

Video.summary: A man has a heart-pounding experience and requires medical assistance. A lawbreaker can't seem to grasp the gravity of her situation. It’s two against one when the cops question an interesting trio.
Video.title: Odd Man Out

Video.summary: A young man receives a wakeup call when officers catch him breaking the law. A traffic stop turns up a trio with a lot to hide. Officers play peacemakers after a board game sparks a family feud.
Video.title: A Man Without a Plan
